_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 11:51 UTC tick — 15 events: 1 hormuz_strait news_flash (Tradewinds 'Three MSC ships attacked by Iran trying to get through Strait of Hormuz' Apr 22 10:45 GMT = FRESH material confirming post-extension Hormuz escalation), 3 boj_intervention (2 stale Nov/Jan, 1 Mar — backgrounder), 11 fed_fomc stale flood (Dec 2025-Mar 2026 archive articles — keywords too broad). Tape 11:21 UTC: GOLD 4752.72 (-3.6p, +0.69% day, day hi 4772.24 — **tested 4775 buy trigger and REJECTED** on hormuz fire window), OIL_CRUDE 89.733 (-35c, day hi 91.177 — **spiked to 91 psych on Tradewinds fire and REJECTED** back to 90 area, -1.44pt round-trip fade), USDJPY 159.214 (flat -0.8p, day hi 159.455 intact), AUDUSD 0.71565 (+1.3p flat, 85.7p above 0.707). 1 MODIFY gold_safehaven_continuation_buy (add 4772.24 reject observation), 2 KEEP (audusd/usdjpy unchanged). 9 structure_watch KEEP. TUNE fed_fomc query keywords (11-article archive flood = broken filter). Material pattern: fresh Hormuz strike news fires → ~15min spike in GOLD/OIL → fade back to pre-news range. Extension-is-baseline / attacks-fade-not-trend emerging.

level_alerts.note: buy AUDUSD 0.707 support on Iran-escalation spike — live 11:08 UTC 0.71552 (-5.7p vs 10:55 0.71609, 85.5p above zone). NARRATIVE UPDATE 11:38 UTC: 4-source verification confirms INDEFINITE ceasefire extension (Reuters/NYT/Detroit News/AJ) — fixed-deadline binary REMOVED. Spike to 0.707 now requires fresh Hormuz strike escalation (already happening: Tradewinds 06:15 ship 'heavy bridge damage', WaPo 10:21 'more ships attacked') OR formal Iran walkout from Islamabad track (Iran calling extension 'ploy', refusing talks until blockade lifted). Probability of clean 0.707 touch reduced — likely path is staircase down on rolling Hormuz incidents not single deadline shock. Wait for rejection wick on 0.707 touch + risk-off confirmation; skip naked breaks. SL 0.703, TP 0.7187 (Fri high) on confirmation.
level_alerts.proximity: 85.5p above 0.707 buy zone (live 11:08 UTC 0.71552 bid). Drifted -5.7p vs 10:55. Indefinite-extension narrative reduces deadline-driven spike probability.

level_alerts.note: sell USDJPY 160.00 intervention red-line fade — live 11:08 UTC 159.222 (-2.5p vs 10:55, 77.8p below 160). NARRATIVE UPDATE 11:38 UTC: indefinite ceasefire extension verified (4 sources) — USD safe-haven flow further faded; day high 159.455 < yesterday's 159.633 confirms pressure OFF the zone. Setup still structurally valid (Japan intervened 159.23 Jan 2026, MoF Katayama G7 'high urgency', BoJ Apr 27-28 priced hold) but probability of touching 160 reduced unless USD bid returns on fresh Hormuz-strike-escalation flight-to-USD. Note: counterfactual hit_rate 100% at 1h+4h on 1 fire (insufficient sample, but historically responsive). Short ONLY on rejection wick at 160.00 + verbal-intervention/MoF tweet confirm; skip naked breaks. SL 160.50, TP 158.50 R:R ~3:1.
level_alerts.proximity: 77.8p below 160.00 intervention red line (live 11:08 UTC 159.222 bid). Day high 159.455 vs yesterday 159.633 — pressure off, USD safe-haven bid further faded post-extension.

level_alerts.note: MODIFIED 11:51 UTC — buy GOLD 4775 breakout on Iran-escalation hedging. Live 11:21 UTC 4752.72 (-3.6p vs 11:08, +0.69% day, day range 4715.44-4772.24). **OBSERVED TEST-REJECT: day high 4772.24 came within 2.76p of 4775 trigger and rejected on Tradewinds Apr 22 10:45 GMT 'Three MSC ships attacked by Iran' fire** — confirms catalyst-conditional thesis works (spike on attack news) AND that 4775 is live resistance (not clean breakout). Reframe: need STRONGER catalyst (US casualty, large tanker sinking, Iran formal walkout) to break 4775, not single incident news. Conservative: wait for M15 close >4775 + volume + no rejection wick. Aggressive: anticipation LIMIT buy at 4735-4740 (between day low 4715 and test-reject 4772) with SL 4705, TP 4775 retest. SL 4730 (below 4715 day low + 15p), TP1 4810, TP2 4850. Conv 3 (catalyst-conditional; today's data: 1 test 1 reject). SKIP if BTC continues +3% AND USD pairs bid AND no fresh Hormuz incident in 4h (pure risk-on = gold sells 4715).
level_alerts.proximity: 22.28p below 4775 buy trigger (live 11:21 UTC 4752.72 bid). Day high 4772.24 rejected <3p from trigger on Hormuz attack news fire.
